# fptcloud_mfke_kubeconfig (Data Source)

Retrieves the kubeconfig for a Managed FKE cluster, exposing the cluster endpoint, CA certificate, and authentication token.

The cluster must be in **RUNNING/READY** state before using this data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fptcloud_mfke_kubeconfig" "example" {
    vpc_id     = "your_vpc_id"
    cluster_id = "your_cluster_id"
}

output "cluster_endpoint" {
  value = data.fptcloud_mfke_kubeconfig.example.endpoint
}

output "cluster_ca_certificate" {
  value     = data.fptcloud_mfke_kubeconfig.example.certificate_authority_data
  sensitive = true
}

output "cluster_token" {
  value     = data.fptcloud_mfke_kubeconfig.example.token
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `vpc_id` (String) The VPC ID that the MFKE cluster belongs to.
- `cluster_id` (String) The cluster ID (name) of the MFKE cluster.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `endpoint` (String) The Kubernetes API server endpoint URL.
- `certificate_authority_data` (String, Sensitive) Base64-encoded certificate authority data for the cluster.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The bearer token used to authenticate against the Kubernetes API server.
